subtitle: multi-agent · online
ws_hint: Workspace: the agent operates only inside here
web_hint: Search the web (server-side, available with Claude)
auto_hint: Run actions without asking for confirmation (not recommended)
input_ph: Give a task: create/edit files, compute, search… (⏎ send, ⇧⏎ newline)
hint: Agents run in the browser and call the online models directly: the Cardputer is not loaded. Destructive actions ask for confirmation.
ready_anthropic: 🟣 Multi-agent ready. Give me a task — I can read, write and edit files in the workspace, run sandboxed code, search the web, and open results in the OS. Destructive actions ask for your approval.
ready_generic: ✅ Multi-agent ready. Give me a task — I can read, write and edit files in the workspace, run sandboxed code, and open apps/results in the OS. Destructive actions ask for your approval.
ready_multi_suffix: I automatically use the best model across your providers, with fallback if one is unavailable.
gate_offline_body: The online agents need internet. Reconnect, or use the fully-offline ANIMA assistant instead.
gate_key_body: The multi-agent system needs an online provider API key — Claude, Groq, Grok (xAI) or Gemini. Add one in Settings ▸ AI: one is enough, but if you configure several I use them all with fallback. Without it you can still use the offline ANIMA assistant.
